1806540.name: The Empress of Aeser
1806540.description:
You play as Tetrine Reish. Tetrine must find a way to lift the curse plaguing her employer's sister, the Empress' Shadow, before the Shadow succeeds in restoring the old dread empire and crowning herself the next Empress of Aeser.

  • Solve puzzles and learn magic in the quest to lift the curse
  • Choices have lasting consequences and can lead to one of several endings
  • Other choices affect Tetrine's personality over time
  • Develop relationships, both friendships and romantic, and make Tetrine to grow as a person
  • Or play to Tetrine's flaws and see what happens
